project.name: LabelCheck Agent
project.artifactPurpose: Clickable package and component workflow map for the Next.js alcohol label verifier prototype.
project.inspiration: DaveJ X prompt, fetched 2026-05-14: single page HTML, components/packages on page, clickable actions, highlighted flows, JSON-driven flow definitions.
project.sourceRequirement: ../Requirements-Take-Home Project_ AI-Powered Alcohol Label Verification App.docx

nodeKinds.label: Build, test, or local runtime tool

nodes.title: Reviewer
nodes.summary: Chooses a demo, fixture, upload, or batch and makes the final disposition.

nodes.title: Home screen
nodes.summary: Main client component. Owns form UI, label preview, fixture loading, verification submit, batch rail, result cards, and issue cards.

nodes.title: App state
nodes.summary: application, labels, labelText, results, activeIndex, isVerifying, and error.

nodes.title: Fixture catalog
nodes.summary: Curated generated fixture metadata, image paths, expected decisions, text fallbacks, and application facts.

nodes.title: Fixture assets
nodes.summary: PNG and JSON pairs copied from fsyeddev/ttb-label for demo, regression, and eval coverage.

nodes.title: File reader
nodes.summary: Reads uploaded image files as data URLs so the UI can preview and send them to the API.

nodes.title: Payload builder
nodes.summary: Normalizes selected labels and text fallback into the labels array expected by the verify route.

nodes.title: Verify route
nodes.summary: Validates request payload with Zod, verifies each label concurrently, returns results and mode metadata.

nodes.title: Request schema
nodes.summary: Requires application facts and one to twenty-five labels per API request before server work begins; browser and CLI chunk larger batches.

nodes.title: Image extractor
nodes.summary: Reads each label through the configured vision provider when configured, otherwise uses supplied text or empty fallback.

nodes.title: Vision model
nodes.summary: Optional vision extractor. Receives label image only, never expected application facts.

nodes.title: Text fallback
nodes.summary: Text-only parser used for demo mode, OCR paste, missing API key, missing data URL, or provider failure.

nodes.title: Rule graph
nodes.summary: Compares application facts to observed label evidence and produces checks, missing facts, score, decision, summary, and next steps.

nodes.title: Result contract
nodes.summary: Shared types for ApplicationData, LabelExtraction, VerificationCheck, VerificationWorkflow, and VerificationResult.

nodes.title: Review helper
nodes.summary: Small UI helper that decides which checks need reviewer attention and how many issue cards to label.

nodes.title: Health route
nodes.summary: Basic runtime health endpoint for deploy or local smoke checks.

nodes.title: Test suites
nodes.summary: Rules, payload, fixture, presentation, generated fixture eval, and API route coverage.

nodes.title: Build gate
nodes.summary: npm run lint, npm run test, and npm run build gate the app before handoff.

nodes.title: Result cards
nodes.summary: Rendered evidence, score, issue cards, batch rail statuses, missing facts, and next actions.

flows.title: Demo label success
flows.intent: Load the built-in clean bourbon example and see an approved result without API credentials.
flows.expectedOutcome: Approved result when demo text matches demo application facts.

edges.label: click Demo
edges.payload: User action resets application, labels, labelText, results, activeIndex, and error.

edges.label: set demo state
edges.payload: demoApplication plus demo label text become the working form state.

edges.label: build labels
edges.payload: labels and fallback text become [{ labelId, fileName, text }].

edges.label: POST JSON
edges.payload: { application, labels } is sent to /api/verify.

edges.label: validate
edges.payload: applicationSchema and labelSchema reject malformed requests.

edges.label: verifyOneLabel
edges.payload: Each label is passed to extractLabel with fileName and text.

edges.label: no image or key
edges.payload: Demo text is parsed by extractionFromPlainText.

edges.label: observed evidence
edges.payload: LabelExtraction has brand, class, ABV, contents, warning, bottler, confidence, notes.

edges.label: result contract
edges.payload: VerificationResult includes decision approved, score, checks, workflow, and nextSteps.

edges.label: render response
edges.payload: results[] populates score, evidence, issue cards, and next action copy.

edges.label: issue labels
edges.payload: issueTitle(0) renders No issues.

flows.title: Fixture mismatch failure
flows.intent: Load a generated fixture where source facts deliberately disagree with visible label evidence.
flows.input: Open Fixtures and text fallback, select Brand mismatch rejection, then verify.
flows.expectedOutcome: Rejected result with blocking brand-name mismatch and correction guidance.

edges.label: select fixture
edges.payload: Fixture button calls loadFixture(fixture).

edges.label: fixture metadata
edges.payload: FixtureCase supplies expectedDecision, application facts, public image path, public JSON path, and text fallback.

edges.label: fetch PNG
edges.payload: public/evals/fixtures/spirits-generated-canonical/{fixture}.png is fetched as a Blob.

edges.label: Blob to data URL
edges.payload: FileReader creates a data URL for preview and optional vision extraction.

edges.label: set active label
edges.payload: labels = [{ labelId, fileName, mimeType, dataUrl, text }].

edges.label: submit state
edges.payload: Application facts and label payload move into POST body.

edges.label: POST verify
edges.payload: Route receives one label and one source application record.

edges.label: extract observed
edges.payload: Observed label evidence is extracted from the label image or fixture text.

edges.label: compare blind
edges.payload: AI observed evidence is compared to application facts only inside deterministic rules.

edges.label: blocking result
edges.payload: Brand mismatch returns decision rejected and fail guidance.

flows.title: Uploaded image with vision
flows.intent: Upload a real label photo and use the configured vision model for extraction.
flows.input: Choose Upload or Camera with an image while OPENAI_API_KEY is configured.
flows.expectedOutcome: Vision extraction returns structured observed evidence, then rules decide.

edges.label: choose image
edges.payload: input[type=file] sends one or more File objects to onFiles.

edges.label: read files
edges.payload: Each file becomes PendingLabel with labelId, fileName, mimeType, and dataUrl.

edges.label: preview data URL
edges.payload: dataUrl powers the image preview and server payload.

edges.label: prepare labels
edges.payload: Images keep dataUrl and omit fallback text unless fixture text exists.

edges.label: POST verify
edges.payload: application plus labels array goes to route.

edges.label: extractLabel
edges.payload: Route passes only the current label to extraction.

edges.label: vision request
edges.payload: Model receives strict JSON schema prompt plus input_image data URL. Expected facts are not sent.

edges.label: strict JSON
edges.payload: labelText, brandName, classType, alcoholContent, netContents, warning, bottler, origin, confidence, notes.

edges.label: observed facts
edges.payload: mergeExtraction combines model fields with optional text fallback.

edges.label: result cards
edges.payload: UI renders extracted evidence, checks, score, decision, and next steps.

flows.title: Vision failure fallback
flows.intent: Keep the prototype usable when the model key is missing or provider call fails.
flows.input: No OPENAI_API_KEY, no image dataUrl, unreadable JSON, or provider non-200.
flows.expectedOutcome: Text fallback or empty extraction runs through rules with low confidence and reviewer guidance.

edges.label: attempt extraction
edges.payload: extractLabel receives label text, data URL, mime type, and file name.

edges.label: optional call
edges.payload: Only called when API key and dataUrl are present.

edges.label: failure path
edges.payload: Provider error or unreadable JSON becomes note text and confidence 0.

edges.label: low confidence
edges.payload: Fallback extraction still produces LabelExtraction for deterministic checks.

edges.label: needs review
edges.payload: Confidence gate and missing evidence produce reviewer-facing next steps.

flows.title: Batch verify labels
flows.intent: Select up to 300 label files and verify them as independent rows.
flows.input: Upload multiple images, then click Verify N labels.
flows.expectedOutcome: One result per label, batch rail lets reviewer jump between approved, review, and blocked rows.

edges.label: multi-select files
edges.payload: Browser file picker returns FileList.

edges.label: Promise.all reads
edges.payload: onFiles rejects batches above 300, reads accepted images, and verifies them through 25-label API chunks.

edges.label: labels[]
edges.payload: labels state holds all PendingLabel entries and resets results.

edges.label: build batch payload
edges.payload: Each label preserves file identity and data URL.

edges.label: POST batch
edges.payload: Zod accepts labels array length 1 to 25.

edges.label: Promise.all verifyOneLabel
edges.payload: Each label is extracted independently so one broken image does not fail the full batch.

edges.label: per-label result
edges.payload: Each extraction is converted into one VerificationResult.

edges.label: results[]
edges.payload: UI shows result count, blocked count, and per-label status in the batch rail.

flows.title: Missing application facts
flows.intent: Understand what fails when source facts are incomplete.
flows.input: Clear required application fields and run verification.
flows.expectedOutcome: Rules return missingApplicationFacts and next steps instead of pretending the label passed.

edges.label: edit fields
edges.payload: Application facts inputs mutate application state.

edges.label: blank facts
edges.payload: brandName, classType, alcoholContent, netContents, or bottlerAddress can become empty.

edges.label: submit
edges.payload: Zod requires core string fields but can receive whitespace after UI edits.

edges.label: missing facts
edges.payload: missingApplicationFacts checks blank normalized values and imported country-of-origin needs.

edges.label: workflow
edges.payload: VerificationWorkflow explains missing facts, comparison summary, and next steps.

edges.label: review UI
edges.payload: Missing facts panel shows field labels and correction guidance.

flows.title: Health check
flows.intent: Confirm the app runtime can respond before deeper QA.
flows.expectedOutcome: JSON health response from the Next route.

edges.label: GET health
edges.payload: Smoke check hits the route directly.

edges.label: JSON response
edges.payload: Monitor receives basic runtime health.

flows.title: Production build gate
flows.intent: Validate code before handoff or deploy.
flows.input: npm run lint, npm run test, npm run build.
flows.expectedOutcome: ESLint, Vitest, and Next.js build complete without errors.

edges.label: run gate
edges.payload: Developer invokes package scripts.

edges.label: test suite
edges.payload: Vitest covers rules, route behavior, fixture mapping, and payload preparation.

edges.label: regression checks
edges.payload: Tests exercise pass, mismatch, warning, and generated fixture behavior.

edges.label: compile app
edges.payload: Next build compiles page, routes, shared libraries, and client bundle.
